drop-notice-destroyed: You dropped {0} from your {1} and it was destroyed.
drop-notice-destroyed-spill-contents: You dropped {0} from your {1} and it was destroyed, spilling the contents.
drop-notice-spill-contents: You dropped {0} from your {1} and it broke open, spilling the contents.
pick-up-no-permission: You do not have permission to carry this item.
place-down-no-permission: You do not have permission to place the carried item here.
attachable-behavior-not-found: Attachable behavior not found on entity
block-has-attached-blocks: Cannot place carried block here while it has attached signs
slot-incompatible-block: Cannot place carried block in slot
slot-inventory-open: Currently in use by another player
cannot-swap-back: Cannot put carried item on back
entity-out-of-reach: Target entity is too far away
pick-up-failed-no-permission: You do not have permission to pick up this block
pick-up-failed-too-hot: This block is too hot to carry
place-down-failed-claimed: You do not have permission to place the carried block here
place-down-failed-notenoughspace: Not enough clearance to place block here
place-down-failed-entityintersecting: Cannot place carried block here, an entity is in the way
place-down-failed-requiresolidground: Cannot place carried block here, requires solid ground
place-down-failed-requirehorizontalattac: Cannot place carried block here, requires a wall
pick-up-already-carrying: You are already carrying something in your hands.
pickup-not-owner: This dropped block belongs to another player
unknown-error: An unknown error occurred with CarryOn
attached-block-no-clearance: Not enough clearance to place carried block with attached wall signs
unsupported-attachment: Cannot place carried block here, attached wall sign has no support
